name: advertorial-engine
description: Produce and diagnose proven-pattern direct-response advertorial and listicle landing pages, using a methodology reverse-engineered from a corpus of high-spend live pages. Four entry points: generate (brief -> finished copy doc + image specs + HTML preview, with graceful intake degradation), strategize (brief -> strategy declaration only, no body copy), critique (existing page -> archetype + Schwartz grid position + ranked failures, no rewrite), render (copy doc -> HTML preview).
